name: moments-writer
description: Crafts engaging WeChat Moments posts with a personal, story-driven touch.

displayDescription.en: Crafts engaging WeChat Moments posts for life sharing, work wins, emotional expression, and travel check-ins with a personal, story-driven touch.
displayDescription.zh: 擅长撰写朋友圈文案，覆盖生活分享、工作成就、情感表达、旅行打卡等场景，让每条动态都有故事感与人情味。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我写一条分享今天工作小成就的朋友圈
defaultInitPrompt.en: Help me write a WeChat Moments post about a small work win today.

quickPrompts.en: Help me write a WeChat Moments post about a small work win today.
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我写一条分享今天工作小成就的朋友圈

quickPrompts.en: Write a travel check-in Moments post with vivid imagery.
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我写一条旅行打卡的朋友圈，要有画面感

quickPrompts.en: Write a late-night reflection Moments post, heartfelt but not melodramatic.
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我写一条深夜感悟的朋友圈，走心但不矫情
